docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.00 FILED BY MADDOX,SHAMIKA AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSHINE EXPRESS CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
INVALID POS ON DEFEND, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED AT BUSINESS.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADDOX,SHAMIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNSHINE EXPRESS CLEANERS $150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $150.00, SERVICE VALID. 9SEE REPORT OF SERVICE IN FILE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SUNSHINE EXPRESS CLEANERS
